rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by modifying only the target component's annex
Use only visible identifiers from the target component or its features
Place assumptions and guarantees in the appropriate annex scope
Use assign only for implementation-level bindings in valid scopes
Ensure all package references have matching `with` clauses
Use only valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in declarations
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Remove guarantees with unresolved references or invalid types
generic_rules: Minimize repairs to the smallest necessary scope
Use only visible identifiers from the current context
Ensure all package references have matching `with` clauses
Use only valid AGREE scalar types in declarations
Align helper declaration types with expression types
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `const` for named constants and `eq` for equations
Use `assume` for assumptions and `guarantee` for guarantees
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not place guarantees in implementation scope
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers not in the model
Do not use unresolved identifiers in guarantees
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar types in declarations
irrelevant_topics: AADL Inspector diagnostics about analysis failure
